tweets.text: Oh my god I just found my original 8GB iPhone. It has a pineapple start-up icon. This is amazing.

@J0hnnyXm4s @flexlibris @hopeconf Can you guess whether men or women are usually the victims of revenge porn? Do you think that all the things you said could be true and still be inappropriate and make people feel unwelcome for no reason at all? Listen to why people feel upset.

RT @noahi: Opportunity cost is a harsh mistress.

@Wikisteff I don’t think that’s the best metaphor. Cargo cults enact rituals, falsely believing their behavior impacts the world. However the Bostockian rituals we have inherited from our elders do, indeed, conjure magic. It is up to us to understand the deeper parts if we choose.
I’m gonna start vaping, nothing matters here
If you could harness ignorance we could build the pyramids with the forces in this quiet car exclusively
You ever travel briefly and then just lose all hope in humanity

There are two ladies having a conversation near-yelling, another dude is on the phone, they have made TWO more quiet car announcements, elaborating that this means “library quiet”, and the conductor quietly reminded people as he took their tickets - ANARCHY GUYS
They’ve inspired absolute ANARCHY

“Oh we are on the quiet car? What does that even mean… I didn’t realize the first and last car were the quiet car. Oh what does that sign say? Ah, quiet car. I see now.” verbatim reports from the quiet car, y’all
I deeply would love to believe this, but unfortunately we have to look at the world around us. They do, and well, they do. https://t.co/SyqVJruKet

Right now I am only showing tweets that 
1. Have at least 1 like
2. The robot understands enough to tag

So if you guys don't like something or I don't write it clearly enough for a robot to understand, we cast it back into the ether where it belongs
